task_text: Using vendor_nda_template.txt as reference, write a short cover email (3-4 sentences) that we can send to a new vendor, Apex Data Services, asking them to review and sign the attached NDA. Save it as apex_nda_cover_email.txt.

content.text: Got it — I'll pull the vendor NDA template and draft a concise cover email for Apex Data Services.

content.content:
budget_vs_actuals_q2.xlsx
helios_api_endpoints.txt
hr_performance_reviews_2026.txt
meridian_contract_signed.pdf
office_lease_renewal.txt
team_roster.txt
vendor_nda_template.txt

NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into between
NovaBridge Solutions Inc. ("Disclosing Party") and [VENDOR NAME] ("Receiving Party").

1. Confidential Information
The Receiving Party agrees to hold in strict confidence all technical, business,
and operational information disclosed by the Disclosing Party, including but not
limited to source code, system architecture, client data, and business processes.

2. Term
This Agreement shall remain in effect for three (3) years from the date of signature,
unless terminated earlier by written agreement of both parties.

3. Permitted Disclosures
The Receiving Party may disclose Confidential Information only to employees with a
demonstrated need to know, provided such employees are bound by equivalent obligations.

4. Return of Materials
Upon request or termination, the Receiving Party shall promptly return or certify
destruction of all Confidential Information and copies thereof.

5. Governing Law
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, USA.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties execute this Agreement as of the date below.

NovaBridge Solutions Inc.
Signature: _________________________ Date: __________
Name / Title:

[VENDOR NAME]
Signature: _________________________ Date: __________
Name / Title:

content.text: Found the template — I'll draft the 3-4 sentence cover email and save it for Apex Data Services.

input.content:
Subject: NDA for Review and Signature - NovaBridge Solutions & Apex Data Services

Dear Apex Data Services Team,

We are pleased to begin our potential collaboration and have attached our standard Non-Disclosure Agreement for your review. This agreement protects the confidentiality of technical, business, and operational information shared between our companies for a term of three years. Please review the document and return a signed copy at your earliest convenience.

Should you have any questions about the terms, please don't hesitate to reach out. We look forward to working with you.

Best regards,
NovaBridge Solutions Inc.

content.text: I've drafted the cover email — now I'll tighten it to the requested 3-4 sentences and finalize the file.

input.content:
Subject: NDA for Review and Signature - NovaBridge Solutions & Apex Data Services

Dear Apex Data Services Team,

We are pleased to begin exploring a partnership and have attached our standard Non-Disclosure Agreement for your review. The agreement covers confidentiality for all technical, business, and operational information shared between our companies for the three-year term outlined in the template. Please review and return a signed copy at your earliest convenience. Let us know if you have any questions — we look forward to working with you.

Best regards,
NovaBridge Solutions Inc.

content.text:
Done. I've created **apex_nda_cover_email.txt** based on the vendor NDA template:

The email is 3-4 sentences, addressed to Apex Data Services, references the attached NDA covering confidential technical/business information for 3 years, and asks for review and signature.
